name: Sentra
description: Sentra — Cloud data security platform discovering and classifying sensitive data across AWS, Azure, and GCP storage.

seo.title: Sentra — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Sentra: Sentra — Cloud data security platform discovering and classifying sensitive data across AWS, Azure, and GCP storage.

when_to_use: Sensitive data discovery across S3, Azure Blob, GCS
Cloud DSPM for GDPR and CCPA compliance posture
Automated data classification for PII and PHI
Misconfigured data store detection across multi-cloud
Data access risk scoring for security audit teams

review.verdict: Solid data-security posture tool, but miscategorized here and competing in a crowded DSPM field.
review.best_for: Security teams classifying sensitive cloud data at scale
review.not_for: API gateway needs or small-team security budgets

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
